nasb.text: For if I do this voluntarily, I have a reward; but if against my will, I have a stewardship entrusted to me.

esv.text: For if I do this of my own will, I have a reward, but if not of my own will, I am still entrusted with a stewardship.

cnv.text: 如果我甘心作這事，就有賞賜；即使不甘心，這職責還是託付我了。

ccb.text: 我若甘心乐意地传福音，就可以得奖赏；我若不甘愿，责任也已经委托给我了。

csbs.text: 如果我自愿做这事，就有报偿；如果我不自愿，这任务也已经委托给我了。
